title: Baseline Strategy Documentation Review for Visscher-Caravelle
challenge: Strategy documentation was spread across the organization, lacking central alignment. People struggled to understand the integral strategy and it was not easily transferable. No single unified strategy document existed.
approach: Conducted a baseline strategy documentation review using a 35-question framework across 9 categories (Clarity of Purpose & Vision, Strategic Objectives, External Analysis, Internal Analysis, Documentation Quality, Organizational Alignment & Culture, Execution Plan, Metrics & Monitoring, Strategy Coherence). Analyzed 51 input sources including presentations, spreadsheets, emails, and desk research.
results: Identified 6 key strengths including strong cultural foundation, ambitious vision, and high internal analysis quality
Delivered 6 prioritized recommendations with impact/effort assessment
Provided strategy house framework showing how 5 business pillars relate to overarching strategy
Created roadmap from fragmented documentation to unified strategic direction
deliverables: Baseline Strategy Documentation Review Report (30-page assessment)

title: Strategy Audit & Market Positioning for W2Support
challenge: Three operating companies with strong people and products but unrealized potential. Owner was pulled into daily operations and unable to step back to set strategic direction across the group.
approach: Four-phase strategy audit: (1) Strategic Baseline — document analysis, stakeholder interviews, consolidation; (2) Market Segmentation — market analysis, competitive landscape, trend analysis using Rule of Three; (3) Strategic Positioning — test strategy options (scale, differentiation/premium, niche), consistency check, explicit strategic choice; (4) Recommendations & Next Steps — gap analysis, strategic recommendations with impact/complexity indication.
results: Delivered strategic baseline scoring clarity and consistency across all three entities
Mapped competitive landscape using Rule of Three framework
Identified most promising strategic position for each operating company
Provided prioritized quick wins vs structural decisions
deliverables: Recommendations & Next Steps with Impact/Complexity Matrix

title: VC Automotive Group Strategy Guide
challenge: Needed a comprehensive strategy handbook to align leadership across the group on how to set and execute strategy consistently across business units.
approach: Developed a 4-part strategy framework (Summary, Starting Point, Strategy, Roadmap) with template-driven structure covering competitive position, strategy house, strategic drivers (Market Efficiency, Leverage Capabilities, Diversification, Customer Significance), must-win battles, enablers, and implementation plans. Included a resource library of 13 best-practice frameworks.
results: Delivered comprehensive strategy guide adopted across business units
Created reusable strategic driver framework (Market Efficiency, Leverage Capabilities, Diversification, Customer Significance)
Built resource library of 13 strategy frameworks (Porter's Five Forces, BCG Matrix, Ansoff, PESTLE, etc.)
Established consistent strategy-setting methodology across the group

title: Strategy Reassessment for Vesche-Carpets
challenge: Required a reassessment of overall strategy including strategic capability within the organization and market positioning.
approach: Comprehensive strategy reassessment covering overall strategy review, market analysis, membership/leadership capability framework development, and organizational restructuring.
results: Reorganized into 5 business units for clearer strategic alignment

title: Social Impact Strategy for International Bank
challenge: Needed to develop a sustainability/impact strategy with structured landscape analysis and earnings-capacity analytics.
approach: Conducted structured landscape analysis and earnings-capacity analytics for sustainability and impact strategy development.
results: Created earnings-capacity analytics framework for impact measurement
